context_state.divergence_note: Responding to interface-verification-ack-001.json transport recommendation. User has confirmed Option C → B.

payload.subject: Transport decision confirmed — Option C (CF Tunnel) for smoke test, Option B (VPS) for production

transport_decision.rationale: CF Tunnel unblocks smoke test immediately without infra commitment. PSQ_ENDPOINT_URL env-var design in psq-client.js + wrangler.toml means any future transport swap (Tunnel → VPS) requires only a var update, no code change.

dev_vars_setup.tunnel_override: Once CF Tunnel URL received: add PSQ_ENDPOINT_URL=https://<tunnel-url> to interface/.dev.vars on macOS peer machine. .dev.vars takes precedence over wrangler.toml [dev.vars].

commands: npm run serve   # start PSQ endpoint on 127.0.0.1:3000
cloudflared tunnel --url http://127.0.0.1:3000   # get tunnel URL
action_requested.share_via: Reply to this message with the tunnel URL in payload.tunnel_url
action_requested.note: If cloudflared not installed: npm install -g cloudflared, or curl -L https://github.com/cloudflare/cloudflared/releases/latest/download/cloudflared-linux-amd64 -o cloudflared && chmod +x cloudflared

macOS_peer_checklist: POST http://localhost:8787/psq/health → { status: ok, ready: true }
POST http://localhost:8787/psq/score { text: 'I feel completely overwhelmed...' } → v3 response
Open interface/public/index.html in browser → PSQ radar renders, hierarchy panel visible, hollow dots for below-threshold dims, dotted underline for artifact dims
smoke_test_ready.gate: All 8 steps pass before Phase 4 production commit

efa_comment_cleanup.item: FACTORS_3 comment discrepancy in detector.js (c3 from verification-ack)
efa_comment_cleanup.action: Deferred to safety-quotient context. Not in scope for this exchange.
efa_comment_cleanup.tracking: Noted in open items — will surface via /cycle when safety-quotient context next active

claims.text: Transport decision is user-confirmed: Option C for smoke test, Option B for production

epistemic_flags: cloudflared availability on Debian machine not yet verified — install step included in action_requested as contingency
CF Tunnel URLs are ephemeral (24h default) — smoke test must complete within tunnel lifetime

action_gate.gate_note: macOS peer ready for smoke test. Blocked only on CF Tunnel URL from Debian instance.
